datasets.name: ds_headline
queryLines: WITH latest AS (SELECT run_tag, min(start_ts) AS start_ts, max(end_ts) AS end_ts FROM zh_serverless_ws.momos_cx.benchmark_runs WHERE run_tag = 'momos_2M_serving' GROUP BY run_tag),
h AS (SELECT q.* FROM system.query.history q, latest l
WHERE q.statement_text LIKE ('/* ' || l.run_tag || ' %')
AND q.start_time BETWEEN l.start_ts - INTERVAL 5 MINUTES AND l.end_ts + INTERVAL 5 MINUTES),
per_sec AS (SELECT date_trunc('SECOND', start_time) AS s, count(*) AS c FROM h GROUP BY 1)
SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM h) AS total_queries,
(SELECT round(percentile(c, 0.5), 1) FROM per_sec WHERE c > 5) AS achieved_qps,
(SELECT round((unix_timestamp(max(end_time)) - unix_timestamp(min(start_time))) / 60.0, 1) FROM h) AS span_min,
(SELECT percentile_approx(total_duration_ms, 0.5) FROM h) AS p50_ms,
(SELECT percentile_approx(total_duration_ms, 0.99) FROM h) AS p99_ms,
(SELECT round(avg(CASE WHEN from_result_cache THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100, 1) FROM h) AS cache_hit_pct,
(SELECT round(sum(read_bytes) / 1e9, 2) FROM h) AS gb_read

datasets.name: ds_qps
queryLines: WITH latest AS (SELECT run_tag, min(start_ts) AS start_ts, max(end_ts) AS end_ts FROM zh_serverless_ws.momos_cx.benchmark_runs WHERE run_tag = 'momos_2M_serving' GROUP BY run_tag)
SELECT date_trunc('SECOND', q.start_time) AS ts, count(*) AS qps
FROM system.query.history q, latest l
WHERE q.statement_text LIKE ('/* ' || l.run_tag || ' %')
AND q.start_time BETWEEN l.start_ts - INTERVAL 5 MINUTES AND l.end_ts + INTERVAL 5 MINUTES
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds_cumulative
queryLines: WITH latest AS (SELECT run_tag, min(start_ts) AS start_ts, max(end_ts) AS end_ts FROM zh_serverless_ws.momos_cx.benchmark_runs WHERE run_tag = 'momos_2M_serving' GROUP BY run_tag),
per_sec AS (SELECT date_trunc('SECOND', q.start_time) AS ts, count(*) AS qps
FROM system.query.history q, latest l
WHERE q.statement_text LIKE ('/* ' || l.run_tag || ' %')
AND q.start_time BETWEEN l.start_ts - INTERVAL 5 MINUTES AND l.end_ts + INTERVAL 5 MINUTES
GROUP BY 1)
SELECT ts, sum(qps) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_queries
FROM per_sec ORDER BY ts

datasets.name: ds_per_template
queryLines: WITH latest AS (SELECT run_tag, min(start_ts) AS start_ts, max(end_ts) AS end_ts FROM zh_serverless_ws.momos_cx.benchmark_runs WHERE run_tag = 'momos_2M_serving' GROUP BY run_tag)
SELECT regexp_extract(q.statement_text, 'tpl=([a-zA-Z0-9_]+)', 1) AS template_id,
count(*) AS queries,
percentile_approx(total_duration_ms, 0.5) AS p50_ms,
percentile_approx(total_duration_ms, 0.99) AS p99_ms
FROM system.query.history q, latest l
WHERE q.statement_text LIKE ('/* ' || l.run_tag || ' %')
AND q.start_time BETWEEN l.start_ts - INTERVAL 5 MINUTES AND l.end_ts + INTERVAL 5 MINUTES
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY queries DESC

datasets.name: ds_scaling
queryLines: WITH latest AS (SELECT run_tag, min(start_ts) AS start_ts, max(end_ts) AS end_ts FROM zh_serverless_ws.momos_cx.benchmark_runs WHERE run_tag = 'momos_2M_serving' GROUP BY run_tag),
whid AS (SELECT DISTINCT q.compute.warehouse_id AS wid FROM system.query.history q, latest l
WHERE q.statement_text LIKE ('/* ' || l.run_tag || ' %') AND q.compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL)
SELECT we.event_time AS ts, we.cluster_count AS clusters
FROM system.compute.warehouse_events we, latest l, whid
WHERE we.warehouse_id = whid.wid
AND we.event_time BETWEEN l.start_ts - INTERVAL 3 MINUTES AND l.end_ts + INTERVAL 3 MINUTES
ORDER BY we.event_time

datasets.name: ds_cache
queryLines: WITH latest AS (SELECT run_tag, min(start_ts) AS start_ts, max(end_ts) AS end_ts FROM zh_serverless_ws.momos_cx.benchmark_runs WHERE run_tag = 'momos_2M_serving' GROUP BY run_tag)
SELECT CASE WHEN q.from_result_cache THEN 'cache hit' ELSE 'compute' END AS source, count(*) AS queries
FROM system.query.history q, latest l
WHERE q.statement_text LIKE ('/* ' || l.run_tag || ' %')
AND q.start_time BETWEEN l.start_ts - INTERVAL 5 MINUTES AND l.end_ts + INTERVAL 5 MINUTES
GROUP BY 1

datasets.name: ds_runs
queryLines: SELECT run_tag, mode, scale, concurrency, target_qps, client_total, round(client_qps,1) AS client_qps, client_errors, start_ts
FROM zh_serverless_ws.momos_cx.benchmark_runs ORDER BY start_ts DESC LIMIT 10

lines: # Momos · 2 Million Queries on Databricks Serverless SQL
The 2,007,069-query flagship run — counted and measured from system.query.history (the platform's own audit log).
